disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute onset of frequent watery, non-bloody diarrhoea — about ten motions over roughly five hours, starting after dinner
trigger_question_examples: How many times have you had to go, and since when?
What does the diarrhoea look like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started after dinner, about five hours ago, and I've been ten times — it's completely liquid and watery.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Crampy lower abdominal pain occurring just before each bowel motion
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any tummy pain?
When does the cramping happen?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I get a cramp low down in my tummy just before I have to rush to the toilet.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound weakness and dizziness on standing — patient states she can barely stand up
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself — any dizziness?
What happens when you stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel so weak and dizzy when I stand that I can barely get up off the sofa.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No blood in the stool and no black or tarry motions
trigger_question_examples: Have you seen any blood, or anything black and tarry?
What colour are the motions?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, no blood at all, and nothing black — it's just clear watery liquid.

trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever or shivering?
Do you feel hot and cold?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't been feverish or shivery at all.

trigger_question_examples: Have you been sick or vomited at all?
Any nausea along with the diarrhoea?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't been sick, just the diarrhoea.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No recent antibiotic use and no recent travel
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken any antibiotics recently?
Have you travelled anywhere lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No antibiotics recently, and I haven't been travelling.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Older adult who lives alone with no one else present overnight
trigger_question_examples: Is there anyone at home with you tonight?
Who is around if you need help?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I live on my own — there's no one else here tonight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing biopsy-diagnosed bowel condition that causes recurrent watery diarrhoea, usually managed with diet and an over-the-counter medicine
trigger_question_examples: Has this happened before?
Do you have any known bowel problems?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had bouts before — a few years ago they did a bowel biopsy and said the lining was a bit inflamed and it could usually be managed with diet and a stomach medicine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Took over-the-counter loperamide today with minimal effect
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for it?
Did the Imodium help?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took a couple of Imodium from the cupboard but it barely made any difference.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Still passing some urine, last voided about an hour ago
trigger_question_examples: When did you last pass urine?
Are you still weeing normally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I've still been passing some urine — I last went about an hour ago.
